# JsonRpcNotification constructor

A JSON-RPC notification (§3.4): a one-way message with a [`Method`](./Method.md) but no id, and no response.

```csharp
public JsonRpcNotification(string Method, JsonObject? Params = null)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| Method | The case-sensitive notification name. |
| Params | The notification data as a JSON object, or `null`. |
